mapper.insert: INSERT INTO PUSH_SUBSCRIPTION (FAMILY_ID, USER_ID, USER_AUTH, ENDPOINT, P256DH, AUTH_KEY) VALUES (#{familyId}, #{userId}, #{userAuth}, #{endpoint}, #{p256dh}, #{auth}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE USER_AUTH = #{userAuth}, ENDPOINT = #{endpoint}, P256DH = #{p256dh}, AUTH_KEY = #{auth}, UPD_DT = NOW()
mapper.select: SELECT ENDPOINT AS endpoint, P256DH AS p256dh, AUTH_KEY AS auth FROM PUSH_SUBSCRIPTION WHERE FAMILY_ID = #{familyId} AND USER_AUTH = 'manager'
